name: Africa's Talking API
what_it_does: African CPaaS platform with REST API for SMS, voice calls, USSD sessions, airtime distribution, and mobile money (M-Pesa, MTN MoMo) across 18+ African countries — specializing in telecoms infrastructure unique to African markets including USSD, STK push, and local carrier integrations.
use_cases: Sending SMS notifications to African mobile numbers with local carrier routing
Building USSD menu-driven applications for feature phone users without internet
Distributing airtime to customers or agents as rewards or compensation via API
Processing mobile money payments (M-Pesa, MTN MoMo, Airtel Money) via Payment API
Automated voice calls with IVR for customer service in African markets
not_for: Global SMS outside Africa — use Twilio, Vonage, or Sinch for non-African markets
Web-based rich messaging (WhatsApp, RCS) as primary channel
Teams without presence or users in African markets
best_when: A product serving African markets needs SMS, USSD, voice, airtime, or mobile money via API with deep local carrier integration and competitive African pricing.
avoid_when: Your users are primarily outside Africa — Africa's Talking specializes in African market infrastructure.

auth.notes: API key from account dashboard. Username + API key authentication. Sandbox environment for testing. Production vs sandbox separate keys. Accept header required for JSON responses. No OAuth2.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox: fully free for testing; Production: pay-per-use
pricing.paid_tiers: SMS from $0.005/message (Kenya); airtime, voice, USSD per carrier pricing
pricing.notes: Pay-per-use with no monthly minimums. Free sandbox for full API testing. Kenyan company (Nairobi) with 18+ country coverage. Competitive pricing for African markets — significantly cheaper than Twilio for African SMS. Prepaid account balance model.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API and carrier; throttling applies

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers SMS, Voice, USSD, Airtime, Payments, and IoT. SDKs for 7 languages. Webhook for delivery receipts and USSD sessions. USSD sessions are stateful — must maintain session state in agent. Good API documentation with sandbox for testing.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: SMS sends create new messages — not idempotent. Airtime disbursements create new transactions. Payment requests create new payment requests. Balance queries idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: USSD sessions are stateful with strict timeout (20-30 seconds) — session management required
Carrier-specific delivery reliability varies by country and operator
Prepaid balance model — must maintain positive account balance for sends to proceed
Sender ID (shortcode/alphanumeric) registration required per country — not instant

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR aware. African data residency. API key auth with username. Sandbox isolation for testing. No formal ISO/SOC2 certifications. Mobile money API follows M-Pesa and MTN security protocols. Prepaid model limits fraud exposure.
